_comment: Counterfactual mutation for the auditor drill: fork a finished run at the triage step and override asset_tier=prod. On a non-prod alert this flips soc-policy from a straight-through disposition to the prod auto_remediate/escalate -> analyst_gate (HITL) branch, producing an observable diff. Body shape matches POST /v1/runs/{id}/counterfactual: {step, mutation, reason}.
reason: auditor-drill: what-if the affected asset were production tier?
